purpose.scorer_notes: The session is a teacher-led circle time activity on a mat. The 'Purpose' dimension requires evidence about how materials are arranged at an activity zone to communicate what children should do upon arriving. In this recording, the activity is entirely teacher-directed (songs/storytelling/guided discussion on a mat) with no independent activity zone setup visible. The visual observations describe shelves, wooden structures, and tables covered with white cloths — but none of these are the active activity zone being scored, and there is no description of materials staged at any zone in a way that would allow scoring of self-directed purpose communication. The circle time mat itself has no materials arranged on it that communicate a purpose beyond 'sit here with the teacher.' There is insufficient visual detail about any independently-staged activity zone to score this dimension.
